name: NEXT-ChemX Corporation.
summary: PART I . Company History and General Information NEXT-ChemX Corporation (the Company), originally known as WeWin Group Corp before becoming, from December 2018, AllyMe Group, Inc., was organized on August 13, 2014 as a Nevada corporation under Chapter 78 of the Nevada Revised Statutes and listed under the trading symbol (WWIN). On April 26, 2021, the Company underwent a change of control in which the previous majority shareholder of the Company, sold 8,618,000 shares of common stock of the Compa...
